---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements to documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

**Which documentation needs improvement?**
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] Wiki (specify page)
- [ ] Code comments/docstrings
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Contributing Guide
- [ ] Other (specify)

**Describe the issue**
What's confusing, missing, or incorrect in the current documentation?

**Suggested improvement**
Describe what changes you'd like to see or propose specific wording.

**Target audience**
Who would benefit from this improvement?
- [ ] New users
- [ ] Existing users
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] Maintainers

**Additional context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples to help explain the documentation improvement.
